instruction: Let p be a proposition with truth value {p_str} and q be a proposition with truth value {q_str}. What is the truth value of the conditional statement p -> q (if p then q)?
steps: The conditional p -> q is False ONLY when p is True and q is False.
Equivalently: p -> q is equivalent to (NOT p) OR q.
Since NOT({p_str}) OR {q_str}: the result is {answer_truthval160}.
